prompt: Deep review this plan and fix any issues: test-plans/flawed-plan.md

assertions.name: identifies-vague-tasks
assertions.description: Catches that tasks lack acceptance criteria, payload format, retry parameters, error handling

assertions.name: multi-round-review
assertions.description: Takes 2+ review rounds since the plan is too flawed for a round-1 PASS

assertions.name: improved-plan-quality
assertions.description: Final plan has specific acceptance criteria, defined payload schema, retry config, error handling
